title: Pastors and Masters
author: Ivy Compton Burnett
description: This elegant hardback edition presents Ivy Compton-Burnett's classic satirical novel, Pastors and Masters, featuring striking gilded page edges. A witty novel packed with eccentric characters and valuable insights into twentieth-century society, Pastors and Masters covers the machinations of a boys' preparatory school and its staff.
